title: Acetylacetonato (η5-indenyl)(η5-pyrrolyl)Zirconium(IV)Dithiocarbamates
author: B. KHERA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, University of Delhi, Delhi-110 007 

  Manuscript received 11 June 1982, accepted 28 December 1982  

 (η 5 -indenyl)(η 5 -pyrrolyl)zirconium(IV) dichloride, when treated with acetylacetone in aqueous medium forms ionic derivatives of the type [RR ' Zr(acac)+Cl - (R=C 9 H 7,  R= C 4 H 4 N and Hacac acetylacetone). These ionic derivatives react with dithiocarbamate anions in aqueous solution, giving ionic complexes of the general formula IRR ' Zr (acac) + dtc - (dtc - =Me 2 NCS \(_2^-\) ,Et 2 NCS \(_2^-\) ,  \(i\)  Pr 2 NCS  \(_2^-\) , Me,cyhxNCS \(_2^-\) ,Et, cyhxNCS \(_2^-\) ,  \(i\)  Pr 2 NCS \(_2^-\) ) IR and  1 H mr studies demonstrate that the ligand acetylacetone appears to be chelating in all these complexes. Consequently, tetrahedral coordination about the zirconium atom is proposed.

Department of Chemistry, University of Delhi, Delhi-110 007 

  Manuscript received 11 June 1982, accepted 28 December 1982  

 (η 5 -indenyl)(η 5 -pyrrolyl)zirconium(IV) dichloride, when treated with acetylacetone in aqueous medium forms ionic derivatives of the type [RR ' Zr(acac)+Cl - (R=C 9 H 7,  R= C 4 H 4 N and Hacac acetylacetone). These ionic derivatives react with dithiocarbamate anions in aqueous solution, giving ionic complexes of the general formula IRR ' Zr (acac) + dtc - (dtc - =Me 2 NCS \(_2^-\) ,Et 2 NCS \(_2^-\) ,  \(i\)  Pr 2 NCS  \(_2^-\) , Me,cyhxNCS \(_2^-\) ,Et, cyhxNCS \(_2^-\) ,  \(i\)  Pr 2 NCS \(_2^-\) ) IR and  1 H mr studies demonstrate that the ligand acetylacetone appears to be chelating in all these complexes. Consequently, tetrahedral coordination about the zirconium atom is proposed.
